description: Routing golden set (architecture 5.3). Each case pins the post-cross-check Stage 0.2 routing for a question whose correct routing is known — from documented fix series, catalog semantics, or reviewed production traces. Only assert fields you are confident about; omit the rest. Extend this file whenever a routing failure is fixed (pipeline-failure-diagnostics playbook): add the failing question with its now-correct expected fields so the fix cannot silently regress.
